name: Son Bou Beach Club
description: A beach club at the foot of the island's longest beach, Son Bou, with sunloungers, cabanas, palms and timber terraces, and a notable cocktail list ranging from classic sangrías to signature creations. Nearby, beach bars offer casual food.

highlights: book a sun lounger or cabana facing the island's longest beach
have a cocktail on the wooden terrace at sunset
book in summer: the Son Bou area fills up early
